entities.description: A supplier from whom the organization procures goods or services.
entities.name: Supplier

entities.description: A product or material tracked in inventory.

computed.formula: See domain_rules for quantity_on_hand computation logic

fields.name: quantity_on_order

computed.formula: See domain_rules for quantity_on_order computation logic

fields.computed_from: SUM(po_lines.quantity_ordered - quantity_received WHERE po.status IN ['approved','sent','partially_received'] AND item_id=id)

entities.name: InventoryItem

entities.description: A purchase order issued to a supplier for goods or services.

computed.formula: See domain_rules for tax_total computation logic
See domain_rules for total computation logic

entities.name: PurchaseOrder

entities.description: A line item on a purchase order.
entities.name: PurchaseOrderLine

entities.description: A record of goods physically received against a purchase order.
entities.name: GoodsReceipt

entities.description: A line item on a goods receipt recording the actual quantity received.
entities.name: GoodsReceiptLine

entities.description: Configures multi-level approval thresholds for procurement entities.
entities.name: ApprovalWorkflow

state.poFormStore_description: Stores draft PO with lines during creation/editing
state.goodsReceiptStore_description: Stores active receipt session with lines being recorded

websocket_events.description: Emitted when a PO is approved
Emitted when goods are received for a PO
Emitted when a goods receipt is confirmed
Emitted when item drops below reorder point
Emitted when an auto-reorder is triggered

cross_entity_updates: InventoryItem.quantity_on_order += po_line.quantity_ordered for each line on approval

steps: Check total against approval_workflows for each level
If more levels required: notify next approver via WebSocket
When all levels approved: status = approved
POST /goods-receipts with po_id and receipt lines
For each receipt line: update PO line quantity_received
Check if all lines fully received; set PO status to received or partially_received
journal_entry_side_effects: DR Inventory (asset) / CR Accounts Payable on goods receipt confirmation

steps: Optionally auto-create draft PO from preferred_supplier with reorder_quantity

computed_fields.formula: Updated on each GoodsReceiptLine confirmation += quantity_received
SUM(po_lines.quantity_ordered - quantity_received WHERE po.status IN ['approved','sent','partially_received'] AND item_id=id)

domain_rules.rule: PO requires approval before sending if total > approval_workflow threshold
domain_rules.api_guard: Return 422 if PO.status != approved when calling /send and total > threshold
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Send button disabled until PO is approved when total exceeds threshold

domain_rules.rule: Goods cannot be received against cancelled PO
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Receive action hidden for cancelled POs

domain_rules.rule: Only approved suppliers can receive POs
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Unapproved suppliers show warning badge; PO creation blocked for unapproved supplier
Show error if duplicate po_number entered

domain_rules.api_guard: Return 422 for any status transition from cancelled
domain_rules.ui_behavior: All action buttons disabled for cancelled POs

deleted_at.notes: Soft delete — all queries filter deleted_at IS NULL

org_id_injection.middleware: req.body.org_id is stripped; injected from req.user.org_id

conflict_response.message: Record was modified by another user. Refresh and retry.

concurrency.high_contention_tables: see entities with high write concurrency

audit_trail.triggers: application-level (before write hook) — never DB trigger to avoid log bloat

standard_constraints.name: chk_{table}_deleted_order
standard_constraints.expression: deleted_at IS NULL OR deleted_at >= created_at

db_constraints_policy.enum_validation: DB ENUM types preferred over VARCHAR + CHECK; enum values defined in global enums registry

soft_delete_policy.filter: deleted_at IS NULL applied globally via query builder middleware
soft_delete_policy.cascade: Parent delete soft-deletes children via application cascade, not DB cascade
soft_delete_policy.hard_delete: Prohibited in production; available only via admin CLI with audit log
soft_delete_policy.restore: Set deleted_at = NULL; triggers audit log entry

naming_conventions.date_fields: Always use _at suffix for TIMESTAMPTZ, _date suffix for DATE
naming_conventions.id_fields: Primary key is always id; foreign keys are {entity}_id
